title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. boreale
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. boreale is a subspecies of the rockrose plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. boreale include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. boreale is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
